Title: Welcome
Message: Hello. I will be helping you with your mock calls today. To get started, please respond to the direct message I sent you. You can locate your Direct Messages in the Top, lefthand corner of Discord. I will then call you on Discord. Below you will find instructions on how to join the call. Once we are connected on the audio call, I will give you instructions to share your screen, ok? https://gyazo.com/64ebbf56abfa200efe8694e185f15ba6

Title: Out of Time (Needs Sup)
Message: Our time has come to an end for this shift. We will need to schedule a time to meet again to complete your Supervisor Transfers. You will not need to schedule anything on your end. Please give me one moment to check availability.

Title: Sup Intro
Message: Hello! I'll be helping you complete the Supervisor Transfer test call to complete your Certification. I'll provide the next instructions a step at a time, please acknowledge as we go so we can make sure all is ready for the Supervisor Transfer call. OK?

Title: Sup Intro Alt
Message: Okay, now that you've finished your mock calls, I'll assist you in completing the Supervisor Transfer test call to finalize your certification. We've already ensured you're signed out of Playground, signed into Simple Script, and logged into DTE. I will now provide the next steps, one at a time. Please acknowledge each step so we can confirm everything is ready for the Supervisor Transfer call, ok?

Title: Sup-Logout of Playground
Message: Please log out of the Playground (if you're logged in), the log out is in the upper right corner, once logged out go ahead and close that window. -let me know when that’s done please.

Title: Sup-Launch Simple Script
Message:
Next, let's go ahead and next launch Simple Script. Please make sure you are logging in on Simple Script from the External Services menu with your *Gateway Username and password* (example: first.last or first.initial) - if you are logged in using your email you will need to log out and enter the correct login credentials. Do not click on anything within the Simple Script window please.

-Let me know when you have that set please

Title: Sup-Launch DTE #1
Message: Next, Please Launch Call Corp DTE from your Desktop (bottom task bar). https://gyazo.com/6265bf871817789537c8e640e54893b6     -Let me know when that's done please

Title: Sup-Launch DTE #2
Message: Next, you may be met with a small pop-up box to Allow DTE permission to load. Please Click the BLUE “Allow” option. And DTE will then load. https://gyazo.com/f05aaeecb5905945adc60c1411980e76

Title: Sup-Launch DTE #3
Message: You may also receive another small pop-up box in the browser window to allow permission. Please click the always allow button, and click Open Desktop Experience. https://gyazo.com/3f940700dd6ee0bf15bba4c60179dcaa     Let me know when that’s done please.

Title: Sup-Launch DTE #4
Message: Next, Call Corp DTE will prompt you to choose a Profile Option. Please Choose “PRIMARY”. https://gyazo.com/3c93129bd587ea2f016071b8ddb6aa72     Let me know when you are there please.

Title: Sup Transfer #1
Message:
We are now going to proceed with the Supervisor transfer. 

When a call is routed to you.... the script will load on it's own. As soon as the whisper completes -- immediately greet your caller wearing a smile. Follow the script as written, and verify all data entered as you go. Any issues such as no script load or questions during the call please ask here in chat for assistance -- ok? (Once you're taking live calls it will be in the Welcome Team chat)

Title: Sup Transfer #2
Message: If the script is slow to load, use a generic greeting, such as: "Thank you for calling to support WXYZ, my name is ________. One moment, our system is experiencing a slight delay." By then, your script should be fully loaded and ready for you to continue. Please notify the CCM of this or any technical issues in the chat – today, that's in this ACD Certification Chat. Okay?

Title: Sup Request Instructions
Message:
When you need to transfer, you will….

1) Ask in chat first before transferring - include the station, caller's name, and issue ex.: WXYZ, sup request, member's name, and member issue

2) Give the CCM time to check to see if a Supervisor is available

We never put our caller on hold so try to minimize dead air. 

3) When CCM says ok to transfer...

—Let your caller know you are transferring

Title: Transfer Instructions #1
Message:
Once you have received Permission from the CCM to Transfer the call-

Click Transfer Button In CC

https://gyazo.com/d4039d8d764ad45da252c86d096a6489

Title: Transfer Instructions #2
Message:
On the box that pops up, in the first box make sure it says "Queue"

In the second box, select "ACD Direct Supervisor"

(if you start typing ACD it will scroll to that section)

Be sure to close the call and let the caller know to please hold for the transfer.

Then click Blind Transfer, and the call will be transferred to the Supervisor.

https://gyazo.com/2971f576b153052395f7be7ac7e4b19b

https://gyazo.com/b7b946df7c0d6aa4d18729e00480e0b9

Title: Change DTE Status
Message:
OK, so that you can receive the call I need to have you change your DTE to Ready status.

On DTE, click the Icon with the Person and Check Mark till it shows

“Ready” and is GREEN. And we will do the FIRST call.

https://gyazo.com/01a435d23c45e300087dd5c39d172fd5

Title: DTE Status
Message: Ok, I show your status as Ready on my end. I am now going to call. You should receive the call in a moment.

Title: You May Transfer
Message: You may transfer the call now.

Title: Disposition
Message:
Click the cancel button in the script (red phone) and disposition as Test / Training

- let me know when you have that please

Next, Please Disposition the call in Call Corp.

You will choose the option from the list that best matches what happened on the call. And then DTE will go back to “ Ready Status” automatically.

Title: Stars Post-Sup Transfer
Message: WXYZ: Supervisor Test Call Being Queued

Title: Passed All
Message:
**:tada: Congratulations! Great job! You have successfully completed your test calls.  Watch your inbox for your step 4 final instructions - your Welcome Team TLMS information. Please log out of CallCorp and Simple Script with the Log Out links (never X out of these windows). Welcome to ACDD! Have a fabulous remainder of your day! • If you haven't already done so be sure to complete any additional courses assigned in your TLMS. Email certification@acdsupport.com for any questions on courses.• If you're signed up on any additional mock or testing shifts, please take a moment to go to Current Schedule under My Schedule in Gateway and remove them.
**Welcome to ACDD! Have a fabulous remainder of your day!**

Title: Failed 1st Sup Transfer
Message: Unfortunately our call did not result in a successful transfer to a supervisor. Please take a moment to review the steps that we went through here in chat and let me know when you're ready to try again.

Title: Failed Both Sup Transfers
Message:
Unfortunately our call did not result in a successful transfer to a supervisor. Please review the steps in the presentation. Since both attempts at supervisor transfers this session were not successful, we will need to schedule a time to meet again to complete your Supervisor Transfers. 
You will not need to schedule anything on your end. Please give me a moment to check availability.

Title: Fail Session
Message:
It was a pleasure working with you today. Unfortunately, based on our session today, I can’t pass you. I think you will benefit from further practice in the WXYZ Certification script. Please reschedule for another Mock session in Gateway as soon as possible (within 24 hours).

If you don’t see a shift, please check back periodically as the shifts will be added as soon as possible to your Shifts Calendar. You can also check out the test chat room and if we have time, we will post a message – you can come in and we can help you then.

Title: Fail Final Attempt
Message: Thank you for your time and interest in becoming a phone agent for ACD Direct and it was a pleasure working with you today. Unfortunately, based on our session, I'm unable to pass you. At this time you have exceeded the amount of Mock Call session attempts allowed. We wish you luck in your future endeavors and have a nice day.

Title: Wrong Headset
Message: It was a pleasure working with you today. Unfortunately, based on our session today, I can’t pass you. A USB headset with a noise cancelling microphone is required to contract with ACD. Please reschedule for another Mock session in Gateway as soon as possible (within 24 hours). If you don’t see a shift, please check back periodically as the shifts will be added as soon as possible to your Shifts Calendar. You can also check out the test chat room and if we have time, we will post a message – you can come in and we can help you then.
